command: re-scale enforce verify --all 2>&1 | grep -c 'no covenant header'
re-scale enforce verify --all 2>&1 | grep -c 'methods removed since baseline'
grep -rc '\* Covenant: ' --include='*.scala' sge/src sge-extension sge-jvm-platform 2>/dev/null | awk -F: '$NF>1' | wc -l
grep -rE '\.ignore\b' --include='*.scala' sge/src/test sge-test sge-extension 2>/dev/null | grep '/test/' | wc -l
grep -rE 'assume\(' --include='*.scala' sge/src/test sge-test sge-extension sge-jvm-platform 2>/dev/null | grep '/test' | wc -l
grep -rE 'case _: (Exception|Throwable) =>' --include='*.scala' sge/src/main sge-extension sge-jvm-platform 2>/dev/null | grep '/main/' | wc -l
re-scale db issues list --status open --category review-fable --limit 500 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 | wc -l
grep -rl 'Covenant-source-reference: SGE-original' --include='*.scala' sge/src sge-extension sge-jvm-platform sge-build 2>/dev/null | wc -l
